---
name: document-analyzer
description: Analyzes document content to extract key themes, insights, and structure. Use this when performing deep analysis of individual documents.
---

Analyze markdown documents in workspace/_cache/:
- Extract main topics and key points
- Identify important entities (people, organizations, dates, etc.)
- Determine document type and purpose
- Extract action items, decisions, or recommendations if present
- Note any data, statistics, or metrics
- Assess document quality and completeness

## Analysis Components

For each document, identify:

### Structure
- Document type (report, meeting notes, presentation, etc.)
- Sections and their purposes
- Flow and organization

### Content
- Main themes and topics
- Key arguments or findings
- Supporting evidence
- Important quotes

### Entities
- People and roles
- Organizations
- Dates and timelines
- Projects or initiatives

### Actionable Items
- Decisions made
- Action items
- Recommendations
- Open questions
